meaning: n.(犬,狼等的)尖牙,犬牙,(毒蛇的)毒牙,牙根,尖端vt.灌水引动(水泵)
examples: He lifted White Fang out of the water.
Another man came after White Fang in his boat.
In 2011, Diageo became the largest single shareholder in premium baijiu producer Shui Jing Fang.
In 1916, U.S. writer Jack London, famous for "White Fang" and "Call of the Wild, " died.
